short_description: Performs automated machine learning for classification tasks.
long_description: Automates the process of model training and selection for classification problems by evaluating multiple algorithms and metrics.

argument_clauses.name: TargetColumn
argument_clauses.rDescription: Specifies the name of the column that contains the class labels (target) for training.
argument_clauses.description: Specifies the name of the column that contains the class labels (target) for training.

argument_clauses.name: Algorithm
argument_clauses.description: Specifies the model algorithms to be used for model training phase. By default, all five models are used for training for binary classification, while only three models are used for multiclass.

argument_clauses.name: Verbose
argument_clauses.description: Specifies the detailed execution steps based on verbose level. 0: prints progress bar/leaderboard; 1: prints execution steps; 2: prints intermediate data.

argument_clauses.name: MaxRuntimeSecs
argument_clauses.description: Specifies the time limit in seconds for model training.

argument_clauses.name: StoppingMetric
argument_clauses.description: Specifies the stopping metrics for stopping tolerance in model training. This argument is required if stopping_tolerance is set.

argument_clauses.name: StoppingTolerance
argument_clauses.description: Specifies the stopping tolerance for stopping metrics in model training. This argument is required if stopping_metric is set.

argument_clauses.name: MaxModels
argument_clauses.description: Specifies the maximum number of models to be trained.

argument_clauses.name: CustomConfigFile
argument_clauses.description: Specifies the path of JSON file in case of custom run.

argument_clauses.name: Seed
argument_clauses.description: Specifies the random seed for reproducibility.

argument_clauses.name: Persist
argument_clauses.description: Specifies whether to persist the interim results of the functions in a table or not.

argument_clauses.name: ImbalanceHandlingMethod
argument_clauses.description: Specifies which data imbalance method to use for classification problems.

argument_clauses.name: EnableLasso
argument_clauses.description: Specifies whether to use lasso regression for feature selection.

argument_clauses.name: RaiseErrors
argument_clauses.description: Specifies whether to raise errors or warnings for non-blocking errors.
